title: Add debug logging to time advancement logic
description: Modify maybe_advance_time method in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add debug logging with: sim_id, from_us, to_us, queue_size, pending_rx_timeouts, connected_nodes, waiting_nodes when time advances in BARRIER_SYNC mode.
close_reason: Updated maybe_advance_time in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py with requested debug fields (queue_size, pending_rx_timeouts, connected_nodes=count, waiting_nodes=count). Also updated hal.c time logic comments and added LOG_DBG for advancement decisions in Zephyr sim path. No dead/commented code. Tests pass (simulation validation and barrier sync).
